mapper.select: SELECT u.*, CASE WHEN u.role = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT name FROM info_student WHERE user_id = u.id) WHEN u.role = 'TEACHER' THEN (SELECT name FROM info_teacher WHERE user_id = u.id) ELSE u.username END as name FROM sys_user u WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, role, status, del_flag, create_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, 0, -- 默认正常 0, -- 正常状态 NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
